ogTitle: Eurong vs Evans Landing: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eurong and Evans Landing.
heading: Eurong vs Evans Landing — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eurong, Queensland and Evans Landing, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evans Landing has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Eurong (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eurong or Evans Landing safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eurong has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Evans Landing scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eurong scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Evans Landing scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eurong or Evans Landing?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evans Landing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
